audience_policies.source_phrase: Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date. coupon.source_phrase_block: Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children at 50% off per person (children under 2 always free). Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. All members of your party must be in one vehicle. -The Alden Digital Planetarium, Explorer Express Train, or any special events are not eligible for this discount.
